name: FIRST NORTHERN COMMUNITY BANCORP
summary: First Northern Community Bancorp (FNRN) is a bank holding company operating through its subsidiary, First Northern Bank. The company provides community banking services including commercial loans, real estate loans, consumer banking, and deposit products. It serves individuals, businesses, and agricultural customers primarily in Northern California.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Lending products for business customers including commercial and industrial loans.

products.name: Real Estate Loans
products.description: Mortgage and real estate secured lending for commercial and residential customers.

products.name: Consumer Banking
products.description: Retail banking products including deposit accounts and consumer loans.

products.name: Agricultural Loans
products.description: Lending products tailored to agricultural businesses and farming operations.
